Notice And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Sep-06-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF MATTHEW PERCIVAL'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS.

APPEARANCES: Raul Perez, Esq. of Initiative Legal Group APC 310/556-4881 for pltf & moving party; Dennis E. Raglin, Esq. of Sedgwick LLP 781-7900 for deft & opposing party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. TO THE EXTENT DEFENDANT ACTUALLY SEEKS TO WITHHOLD SOMETHING ON THE BASIS OF PRIVILEGE, DEFENDANT MUST PROVIDE A PRIVILEGE LOG. THE PARTIES ARE DIRECTED TO MEET & CONFER RE: A PROTECTIVE ORDER. IF THEY CANNOT AGREE ON THE TERMS, EACH PARTY MUST SUBMIT A PROPOSED PROTECTIVE ORDER FOR THE COURT'S CONSIDERATION.
Defendant's further responses due by 09/27/11.
As to the financial information, argued and the Court took the matter under submission.
After hearing, the Court ruled as follows:
COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT TO RESPOND TO REQUESTS FOR DOCUMENTS, INTERROGATORIES AS TO FINANCIAL INFORMATION. INFORMATION PROVIDED BY DEFENDANT ON FINANCIALS SHALL BE SUBJECT TO THE PROTECTIVE ORDER. Plaintiff to prepare a proposed form of order. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
